title: Ideal Armory Product Feed
description: Feed contract for Ideal Armory's retailer aggregation pipeline. Validated and consumed by ia-adapter.js. Submit one feed file per pull cadence (hourly, daily, etc.) covering any subset of the 10 supported categories.

version.description: Feed schema version. Must be '1.0' for this schema.

generated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this feed file was generated by the aggregator pipeline.

source.description: Human-readable name of the feed source / retailer network.

products.description: Array of product objects across any mix of supported categories.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: A single product as aggregated from one or more licensed retailers.

id.description: Globally unique product identifier within this feed. Recommended format: '{category}-{sku}' or '{brand-slug}-{model-slug}'. Must be stable across feed refreshes so the adapter can detect updates.

category.description: Category slug. Determines which page the product appears on and which spec fields are relevant.

brand.description: Manufacturer or brand name as it should appear on the product card.

name.description: Product model name, without the brand prefix.

sub.description: Short subtitle shown below the product name on the card. Typically 3-8 words summarizing key specs.

description.description: Long-form product description for the detail modal (2-4 sentences). Plain text, no HTML.

img.description: Absolute URL of the primary product image. Preferred: 800×600px minimum, white/transparent background, JPG or PNG. An empty string causes the placeholder text to render.

stars.description: Average star rating (0–5). Aggregated across retailer and 3rd-party review sources.

reviews.description: Total review count shown alongside the star rating.

badge.description: 'best' renders a 'Best Seller' badge on the product card. Empty string = no badge.

sellers.description: One entry per licensed retailer currently listing this product. The adapter sorts these cheapest-first. Maximum 10 sellers per product (top 3 are shown on the card, all appear in the detail modal).

specs.description: Category-specific product specifications. The adapter flattens all spec fields directly onto the product object, so filter functions access them as p.caliber, p.action, etc.

Seller.title: Seller
Seller.description: A single retailer listing for a product.

name.description: Retailer display name as it should appear in the seller price row.

price.description: Current listing price in USD (before tax and transfer fee). Must be ≥ 0.

stock.description: 'in' = in stock. 'low' = low stock / limited quantity. 'out' = out of stock (still shown but de-emphasized).

url.description: Affiliate or direct product URL. Opened in a new tab from the 'Go to Retailer' button in the detail modal. Use HTTPS.

fflRequired.description: True if this retailer ships to an FFL dealer (standard for all firearms). False for accessories, ammo, and optics that ship direct.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent price/stock update from this retailer. Used for price-history tracking (future feature).

Specs.title: Specs
Specs.description: Category-specific spec fields. All properties are optional at the schema level; required fields per category are enforced by the aggregator pipeline. The adapter flattens all fields onto the product object.

caliber.description: Caliber. Used by handguns, rifles, shotguns (as gauge), ammunition, AR parts, magazines.

action.description: Action type. Handguns: Striker-Fired | Revolver | DA/SA | Single Action | DAO. Rifles: Semi-Auto | Bolt-Action | Lever-Action | Single Shot | Pump-Action. Shotguns: Pump-Action | Semi-Auto | Over-Under | Side-by-Side | Single Shot | Lever-Action.

opticReady.description: True if the firearm has a factory-milled or pre-cut optic mounting surface (pistol) or is otherwise optic-ready.

capacity.description: Magazine/cylinder capacity in rounds. For handguns, rifles, shotguns, magazines.

finish.description: Surface finish / color of the firearm.

features.description: Array of notable feature tags on a rifle.

use.description: Primary intended use. Shotguns: Home Defense | Hunting | Sport Shooting | Tactical. Ammunition: Target | Self-Defense | Hunting | Training.

qty.description: REQUIRED for ammunition. Rounds per package/case. Used by ia-adapter.getPricePerRound() and the ¢/round display.

fps.description: Muzzle velocity in feet per second.

material.description: Holster material. Also used for magazines.

fits.description: Firearm model or family this holster/magazine is compatible with.

fitsCaliber.description: Caliber or bore diameter this cleaning product is designed for.

gunCapacity.description: Number of long guns or handguns the safe is rated to hold.

fireRating.description: Fire protection rating. 'None' if the safe has no fire rating.
